title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
